Like they'll see, it can be like related by tag even, or yeah, just a really great way to have people click around the site, you know, shop around.
Because right now you have to go back to the blog landing page and then you can't, it's confusing how to find different things.
I mean, you can either drop down to the categories and stuff, but I think that'll really help those.
Yeah, agreed.
Okay, yes, I can get, I can get our web agency working on that today.
Sweet, that would be amazing.
Yeah, so I know that's a lot.
There was one more topic on the, I don't know what we're calling, but I was calling the new batch of content like the summer fun party blitz content or something.
But there's one more on there you had a comment about, like say more, and then like I answered you on there.
So if you approve or like, if you like that.
And as is, then I'll put that into the batch as well.
But other than that, that's pretty much a lot.
Oh, and just that policy brief doc that you sent to me today.
just got the access.
And then I can, I will work on that today.
I couldn't open it.
But I did request.
Give you, I can't give you access.
I don't have access to give you access.
It has the power.
I requested it to whoever has the power.
I also requested it.
And I will also send her a slap.
Because when you get power, then you can give me power.
Yeah.
What is it?
Mississippi?
Yes.
Because we want to have an opinion on that publicly pretty soon.
Sweet.
I couldn't work on it today.
I'm online for like another good couple hours.
So I can work on that today as long as they get access.
And then, yeah, if that works for you, then that's the kind of way we'll go ahead with.
Next week's topics, I will give you them in a list anyways, like tomorrow, just so you can see, like, these are the ones I chose from our party summer blitz.
You know what I'm talking about, so it's great.
And I'll give you the chunk of what we're going to do, and then you can weigh in.
Like, if you have any preference, like, I know you were saying, like, the top chunk is, like, especially exciting, I would like to prioritize those, because to me, they're the best ones, too.
Or, like, most relevant, most important right now.
So we'll start top to bottom otherwise, and, yeah, just go from there.
Okay, awesome.
Thank you so much.
Yeah, thank you, Nikki.
Have a great, and was it your birthday as part of the birthday fun party?
Was it?
Happy birthday.
Oh, that's awesome.
Yeah, I'm glad.
hope you got a little bit of time off for the past weekend, long weekend there, and you got to celebrate.
Yep, it was great.
Yay, okay, cool.
Happy birthday, happy belated birthday, and, yeah, we'll chat soon.
Okay, thanks, Jen.
Bye.
Bye.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between SchoolAI and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, upcoming product launches, and website improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/CzmjxTGJxoBV5rKyor4mxCXHyiD3Qpj_?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SchoolAI is preparing for a major product launch on June 25th, with a new homepage and core product pages](https://fathom.video/share/CzmjxTGJxoBV5rKyor4mxCXHyiD3Qpj_?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
  - [Content strategy is evolving to align with SchoolAI's new positioning as a "student success platform"](https://fathom.video/share/CzmjxTGJxoBV5rKyor4mxCXHyiD3Qpj_?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [Website performance is generally positive, with GrowthX content showing growth despite overall site traffic being slightly down](https://fathom.video/share/CzmjxTGJxoBV5rKyor4mxCXHyiD3Qpj_?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
  - [Several key articles will be refreshed to improve CTR and relevance, with input from educators](https://fathom.video/share/CzmjxTGJxoBV5rKyor4mxCXHyiD3Qpj_?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)

## Topics

### SchoolAI Product Launch Timeline

  - [June 20th: Blog post and new homepage ready](https://fathom.video/share/CzmjxTGJxoBV5rKyor4mxCXHyiD3Qpj_?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [June 25th: Major launch event (similar to Google Marketing Live)](https://fathom.video/share/CzmjxTGJxoBV5rKyor4mxCXHyiD3Qpj_?tab=summary&timestamp=57.0)
  - [June 30th: ISTE event with keynote and live product demos](https://fathom.video/share/CzmjxTGJxoBV5rKyor4mxCXHyiD3Qpj_?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
  - [July 9th: Full product launch with direct mail campaign](https://fathom.video/share/CzmjxTGJxoBV5rKyor4mxCXHyiD3Qpj_?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [End of year: Phased rollout of additional products (student, admin, parent/home)](https://fathom.video/share/CzmjxTGJxoBV5rKyor4mxCXHyiD3Qpj_?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)

### Content Strategy and Messaging

  - [SchoolAI positioning as a "student success platform"](https://fathom.video/share/CzmjxTGJxoBV5rKyor4mxCXHyiD3Qpj_?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [New messaging framework pending CEO approval](https://fathom.video/share/CzmjxTGJxoBV5rKyor4mxCXHyiD3Qpj_?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [Waterfall approach to develop messaging for each of the four products](https://fathom.video/share/CzmjxTGJxoBV5rKyor4mxCXHyiD3Qpj_?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)
  - [Nikki to share approved messaging and video content with Jenn](https://fathom.video/share/CzmjxTGJxoBV5rKyor4mxCXHyiD3Qpj_?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)

### Website Performance and Content Updates

  - [Overall site traffic slightly down (30 clicks, 5,600 impressions)](https://fathom.video/share/CzmjxTGJxoBV5rKyor4mxCXHyiD3Qpj_?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
  - [GrowthX content showing growth (up in clicks and sessions)](https://fathom.video/share/CzmjxTGJxoBV5rKyor4mxCXHyiD3Qpj_?tab=summary&timestamp=977.0)
  - [Plan to refresh top-performing articles:](https://fathom.video/share/CzmjxTGJxoBV5rKyor4mxCXHyiD3Qpj_?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
    1.  AI homework helper tools
    2.  Formative vs. summative assessment
    3.  Leading benefits of AI in education
  - [Focusing on fleshing out content and improving relevance for educators](https://fathom.video/share/CzmjxTGJxoBV5rKyor4mxCXHyiD3Qpj_?tab=summary&timestamp=1281.0)

### Website Improvements

  - [Enable linking to product spaces in blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/CzmjxTGJxoBV5rKyor4mxCXHyiD3Qpj_?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
  - [Add clickable titles/text on blog landing page](https://fathom.video/share/CzmjxTGJxoBV5rKyor4mxCXHyiD3Qpj_?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Implement related posts section at the bottom of each article](https://fathom.video/share/CzmjxTGJxoBV5rKyor4mxCXHyiD3Qpj_?tab=summary&timestamp=1788.0)

### Collaboration with Educators

  - [Graham (educator) providing valuable input on content accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/CzmjxTGJxoBV5rKyor4mxCXHyiD3Qpj_?tab=summary&timestamp=1619.0)
  - [Plan to involve SchoolAI's education team for reviewing important refreshed content](https://fathom.video/share/CzmjxTGJxoBV5rKyor4mxCXHyiD3Qpj_?tab=summary&timestamp=1630.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Nikki to share approved messaging and video content with Jenn](https://fathom.video/share/CzmjxTGJxoBV5rKyor4mxCXHyiD3Qpj_?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
  - [Jenn to refresh three top-performing articles and add seven new topics from the summer content batch](https://fathom.video/share/CzmjxTGJxoBV5rKyor4mxCXHyiD3Qpj_?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)
  - [Implement website improvements (clickable blog titles, related posts section)](https://fathom.video/share/CzmjxTGJxoBV5rKyor4mxCXHyiD3Qpj_?tab=summary&timestamp=1830.0)
  - [Jenn to work on Mississippi policy brief once access is granted](https://fathom.video/share/CzmjxTGJxoBV5rKyor4mxCXHyiD3Qpj_?tab=summary&timestamp=1867.0)
  - [Continue weekly content planning and review process](https://fathom.video/share/CzmjxTGJxoBV5rKyor4mxCXHyiD3Qpj_?tab=summary&timestamp=1955.0)

action_items.description: Add 7 new blog posts from summer content batch to publishing queue
Refresh 3 blog posts - AI homework helper tools, formative vs summative assessment, leading benefits of AI in education. Flesh out content, improve relevance.
Add new tab in content tracking table to log refresh dates for blog posts
Contact web agency to implement blog navigation improvements - clickable titles/text, related posts shelf at bottom of each post
Draft content on Mississippi policy brief once access granted
